description: Predict the minimum free energy (MFE) secondary structures for the human pre-microRNAs let-7a-1, miR-155, and miR-21 found in ~/UGENE_Data/rna/human_pre_miRNAs.fasta. Export the annotated sequences as a single GenBank file to ~/UGENE_Data/rna/results/mirna_structures.gb. Additionally, generate a text report at ~/UGENE_Data/rna/results/mfe_report.txt that includes the name, predicted MFE value, and complete dot-bracket notation for each miRNA.
